spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment, heavily relying on left-aligned text with large right-side negative space

motion_strategy.smooth_scroll: Lenis for momentum scrolling to feel premium
motion_strategy.scroll_triggers: Framer Motion initial={{opacity:0, y:40}} whileInView={{opacity:1, y:0}} viewport={{once:true}}
motion_strategy.parallax: Use Framer Motion useScroll and useTransform for y-axis movement on hero and macro images

sections_blueprint.name: Navigation
sections_blueprint.elements: Brand mark (serif, text-2xl), Links (desktop hidden on mobile), Primary 'WhatsApp to Order' CTA button. Glassmorphism background.

sections_blueprint.name: Hero
sections_blueprint.elements: Full viewport height. Background image of dark macro watch dial. Black/50 overlay. H1: 'The Pinnacle of Craftsmanship. Zero Compromise.' Sub: '1:1 Swiss Replica Watches'. Floating WhatsApp CTA.

sections_blueprint.name: Why Buy / Trust
sections_blueprint.elements: Large editorial statement using serif. 3 pillars (1:1 Quality, Swiss Movement, Free Shipping) laid out asymmetrically. Use the gradient_wash here to transition smoothly.

sections_blueprint.name: Featured Collection
sections_blueprint.elements: Tetris Grid showing watch models (Rolex Submariner, AP Royal Oak, Patek Nautilus, Omega). High contrast, sharp edges. Hover zoom effect on images within hidden overflow containers.

sections_blueprint.name: Craftsmanship
sections_blueprint.elements: Full width section with Swiss movement macro image. Strong parallax effect. Overlay text: 'Obsessive Details.'

sections_blueprint.name: How to Order
sections_blueprint.elements: 3 minimalist glass cards (Browse -> WhatsApp -> Doorstep Delivery). Minimal text, pure functional clarity.

sections_blueprint.name: Testimonials
sections_blueprint.elements: Lifestyle imagery of men in suits/bathrobes. Quotes, 5-star ratings. Horizontal scroll or Framer Motion drag slider.

sections_blueprint.name: FAQ & Final CTA
sections_blueprint.elements: Shadcn accordion for FAQs. Massive 'Find Your Watch' text in Serif font. Final WhatsApp button. Dark footer with subtle links.

hero_background.description: Macro shot of a luxury watch dial with dramatic lighting on rock texture, perfect for cinematic hero section

craftsmanship_macro.description: Close-up of an intricate Swiss mechanical watch movement. Ideal for the parallax craftsmanship section.

collection_rolex.description: Round silver Rolex analog watch, perfect for featured collection grid

collection_ap.description: Blue and silver luxury watch, representing Royal Oak or Nautilus style in the grid

collection_patek.description: Silver and gold round analog watch

collection_omega.description: Black watch on a white surface, contrasting grid item

lifestyle_testimonial_1.description: Businessman checking watch, perfect for customer testimonials

lifestyle_testimonial_2.description: Person in bathrobe with wine - luxury lifestyle vibe for testimonials

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard React .js syntax, no TypeScript.
Implement Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered animations (fade up, parallax). All grid animations must target direct children.
Ensure strict adherence to the Luxury Archetype color palette: Jet Black/Slate backgrounds with Gold/Champagne primary CTA buttons.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards for the Featured Collection. Build a custom HTML/Tailwind bento grid with asymmetric spans (Tetris grid).
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with Duotone weight for a high-end look.
CRITICAL: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive and key informational elements (buttons, links, form inputs, accordion triggers).
Use Shadcn UI for the FAQ accordion, but override its styles to match the dark luxury theme (no light borders, transparent backgrounds).
Ensure the hero image has a dark overlay (bg-black/50) to make text readable. Use 'Playfair Display' for Headings and 'Outfit' for Body.
Add a fixed 'WhatsApp to Order' floating button at the bottom right corner.
